title: aws-kms in SecretStore dispatch always returns Unavailable — confusing
description: secretx/src/lib.rs includes aws-kms in the from_uri SecretStore dispatch, but AwsKmsBackend::get/put always returns Unavailable. A caller who enables the aws-kms feature and calls from_uri gets back an Arc<dyn SecretStore> they can't use. The stub SecretStore impl exists only to thread the feature-flag machinery; it should either be removed from the dispatch (forcing callers to instantiate signing backends directly) or there should be a from_signing_uri dispatch. The current situation creates a trap: users reasonably expect from_uri to return a usable backend.
